channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Study finds nitrogen pollution alters forest soil respiration and carbon cycling
item.description: New global research reveals that excess nitrogen pollution is significantly altering how forests regulate carbon through soil respiration, the process by which roots and soil microbes release carbon d...

item.title: Brooke Shields Credits Career Reinvention and Resilience for Her Long-Term Success in Entertainment
item.description: Brooke Shields has reflected on the importance of adaptability and reinvention in sustaining a long and successful career in the entertainment industry. Speaking on The Bossticks podcast, Shields expl...

item.title: Cory Doctorow Argues AI Is Being Promoted as a Substitute for Human Labor and Social Relationships
item.description: In this opinion column, author and technology commentator Cory Doctorow argues that many wealthy technology leaders and policymakers view artificial intelligence as a way to reduce dependence on human...

item.title: Nvidia Introduces RTX Spark AI PCs and Expands Its Push Into the CPU Market
item.description: Nvidia used the Computex trade show in Taipei to unveil RTX Spark, a new AI-focused PC processor that the company describes as a superchip capable of delivering up to one petaflop of performance. The ...

item.title: Four suspects arrested after Facebook Marketplace robbery and kidnapping in Soshanguve
item.description: Four men aged between 18 and 25 have been arrested in connection with a robbery and kidnapping case linked to an alleged online scam in Soshanguve, north of Pretoria. According to SAPS Rietgat, the in...

item.title: Ukraine Rejects Russian Claims of Deliberate Drone Strike on Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant
item.description: Russian state nuclear energy company Rosatom stated that a Ukrainian drone struck the turbine hall of Unit 6 at the Russian-controlled Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Power Plant, the largest nuclear facility in...

item.title: 1960s Swimsuit Fashion: Styles, Trends, and Cultural Shifts
item.description: The 1960s marked a transformative period for swimwear as postwar prosperity, increased travel, and shifting social norms influenced fashion choices. Women’s swimsuits evolved from the more structured ...

item.title: Vandalism and Assault at Popular Educator Khan Sir's Coaching Institute in Patna Under Police Investigation
item.description: In a concerning incident that took place on Tuesday night in Patna, Bihar, some unidentified men entered the coaching centre of famous educator Khan Sir and assaulted the security guard. The guard was...

item.title: Experts urge shift to smaller, locally powered data centres to support Africa’s AI growth
item.description: Experts are saying that Africa’s future in artificial intelligence will largely depend on building smaller, locally distributed data centres instead of relying on massive hyperscale infrastructure. Th...

item.title: Biographer Michael Wolff Comments on President Trump's Increased Late-Night Truth Social Activity
item.description: According to a recent analysis by author and Trump biographer Michael Wolff, President Donald Trump has significantly increased his late-night activity on Truth Social. Wolff, who co-hosts the podcast...

item.title: Ethiopia Accelerates Economic Reforms Amid Debate Over Risks to Domestic Industries
item.description: Ethiopia is going through one of the biggest economic transitions in its recent history as Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed’s government pushes ahead with major liberalisation reforms. After many years of re...

item.title: Media analyst says CBS firing of veteran journalist Scott Pelley could trigger internal turmoil and legal dispute
item.description: A media controversy has emerged at CBS following the reported dismissal of veteran journalist Scott Pelley, who had worked at the network for more than four decades. According to the article, CBS exec...

item.title: Legal expert says Trump administration’s “weaponization fund” is Todd Blanche’s main political liability
item.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche is facing increasing political scrutiny, but according to legal analyst Harry Litman, the controversy surrounding the Jeffrey Epstein files is not his most se...

item.title: Justice Sotomayor criticizes Supreme Court ruling in Alabama redistricting case over voting rights concerns
item.description: Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor issued a forceful dissenting opinion in a case concerning Alabama’s congressional district map, arguing that the Court’s majority failed to properly address serio...

item.title: President Samia Appoints Ummy Mwalimu as Presidential Advisor for Reproductive, Maternal and Child Health
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has appointed former Health Minister Ummy Mwalimu as Presidential Advisor on Reproductive, Maternal and Child Health. The appointment was announced on June 2, 2026, throu...

item.title: U.S. primary elections held across six states set stage for 2026 midterms
item.description: Primary elections were held across six U.S. states, drawing national attention as key contests began shaping the political landscape ahead of the November midterm elections. The races span California,...

item.title: Two convicted and sentenced to life imprisonment in Dar es Salaam heroin trafficking case; co-accused mother acquitted
item.description: The High Court of Tanzania sitting in Dar es Salaam has sentenced two residents to life imprisonment after finding them guilty of trafficking 15.19 kilogrammes of heroin, while acquitting a third accu...

item.title: Article Claims Scott Pelley Was Fired Following Internal Disputes at '60 Minutes'
item.description: The article reports that veteran CBS journalist Scott Pelley was allegedly fired from the news magazine program '60 Minutes' after a confrontation with newly appointed leadership. According to the rep...

item.title: Candace Owens Scheduled to Speak at Russian Economic Forum Alongside Sanctioned Russian Officials
item.description: Raw Story reports that conservative commentator and podcaster Candace Owens is scheduled to participate in a panel discussion at the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum in Russia. According to...

item.title: CNN commentators criticize Bill Pulte's appointment as acting Director of National Intelligence
item.description: CNN commentators and political analysts expressed concern over President Donald Trump's appointment of Bill Pulte as acting Director of National Intelligence. Pulte, who currently serves as director o...
